description_long: This object consists of two small, rectangular snack packages placed side by side, each with a colorful, glossy exterior. The left package is predominantly red and yellow, featuring Korean text and an image of a bowl of soup with vegetables and an egg, suggesting a spicy flavor. The right package is green and yellow, also with Korean text and a similar bowl image, but with a different color scheme indicating a vegetable flavor. Both packages display a round logo with a blue and red motif in the lower left corner, and additional product information and graphics on the back. The packaging appears to be made of flexible plastic, with a heat-sealed top and bottom, and is likely filled with air and snack contents. The overall appearance is vibrant and designed to attract attention, with clear flavor differentiation through color and text.
description: Two colorful, glossy snack packages with Korean text and food imagery, one red/yellow (spicy) and one green/yellow (vegetable), both featuring a round logo and detailed back labels.
description_view_0: Front view showing both packages side by side, with clear Korean text, food images, and a round logo on each.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the packages, with minimal visible detail except the edge seams.
description_view_2: Back view displaying detailed product information, barcodes, and small mascot graphics on each package.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and edge seams of the packages.
attribute_brand_logo: A round logo with a blue and red motif is visible on the lower left of both packages' fronts and backs.
attribute_flavor_indication: The left package uses red and yellow colors with Korean text indicating 'spicy', while the right package uses green and yellow with text indicating 'vegetable'.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Yes, detailed product and nutritional information is visible on the back of both packages, including barcodes and ingredient lists.
attribute_promotional_graphics: Small mascot graphics are present on the back of both packages, featuring a cartoon character in green attire.
